cards.back: The tendency of an AI system to favor certain groups or individuals over others, often due to discriminatory data or algorithms
The ability of an AI system to provide insights and explanations for its decisions and actions
The principle of ensuring that AI systems treat individuals equally and without prejudice, regardless of their background or characteristics
The practice of making AI decision-making processes and data available for scrutiny and evaluation
The responsibility of individuals or organizations to ensure that AI systems are used in a way that is ethical and responsible
